subject: Meditite, a small blue and white humanoid creature with a round head, floating in a meditative pose surrounded by a soft white aura
description: Meditite floats in a serene meditative stance within a forest clearing, its small round-headed body enveloped in a soft glowing aura. The creature's arms are spread slightly outward in a balanced pose. The background is rendered in warm golden and green tones with blurred foliage and shafts of light filtering through the canopy, conveying a quiet, contemplative woodland atmosphere.
foreground: Meditite hovering in a meditative floating pose with a soft white aura
background: Warm-lit forest clearing with golden light filtering through foliage
emotion: serene and focused, meditative stillness in body language
